stories.title: Fetch live prices from Polymarket and Kalshi APIs
stories.description: Create async price fetchers for both markets. Store normalized prices in Postgres via MCP. Include retry logic and rate limiting.

stories.title: Build arbitrage scanner that detects >0.5% spreads
stories.description: Compare equivalent contracts across markets. Calculate net spread after estimated fees. Rank by profit potential. Output scan reports to reports/ directory.

stories.title: Implement risk manager with 2% portfolio cap
stories.description: Validate every proposed trade against portfolio risk limits. Simulate worst-case loss. Block trades that violate the 2% single-position cap. Log all decisions to risk.log.

stories.title: Wire up Telegram notifications for high-edge alerts
stories.description: When scanner finds >1% edge, send formatted alert via Telegram MCP server. Include market names, spread %, and recommended position size.

stories.title: End-to-end paper trading simulation
stories.description: Run the full pipeline: fetch prices -> scan -> risk check -> simulated execution. Track P&L in a local SQLite ledger. Print summary report.

completion_criteria: All stories have passes=true and tests pass
notes: Ralph checks: jq '[.stories[] | select(.passes == false)] | length' prd.json
